title: Grown crops indicator
description: Changes the texture of almost any crop when it's grown and ready to be harvested!
body:
Grown crops indicator
--- Adds an outline to most of the crops (the last ones will be done in the future) to make distinguishable from other crops still growing. Current crops added : - Beetroots - Carrots - Nether wart - Potatoes - Sweet berry bush - Torchflower - Wheat [Showcased](https://youtu.be/zTeWlyN4T-s?t=96) on ThrillHouse 2.0's channel!
